docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO DEC-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BONITA COHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOYD HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT SHE HAS SERVED THE DEFENDANT BUT WHEN ASKED FOR PROOF SHE WAS UNABLE TO SHOW PROOF. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE AT FIRST BUT CHANGE HIS MIND TO WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE AND ALSO REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE MATTER SO HE CAN FILE MOTIONS BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT REQUIRED TO REDO-SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COHN, BONITA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, LOYD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHN, BONITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-20-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BONITA COHN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE OF $40 WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHN, BONITA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, LOYD
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
